rules.rule: Flag hardcoded user-facing string literals in platform-ui and platform-reader Kotlin source under src/main. User-facing copy must use stringResource() or pluralStringResource() with keys synced from platform-localization. Authors should wire existing keys or add keys in platform-localization and sync strings_i18n.xml.

Reject direct edits to synced localization catalogs. User-facing strings are owned by platform-localization and synced into **/strings_i18n.xml and locale overlays (**/values-*/strings.xml). Feature PRs must not hand-edit these files; add keys in platform-localization and run the sync workflow instead.
